notes: Audio split into a one-time asset pack — game updates are now ~30 MB (Win) / 30 MB (Linux) / 66 MB (Mac) instead of 96 MB every time. ZONE mode removed. CAPTURE: bot races for the orb, drop-on-damage drops at arena center (not hit position), first to 30 ends the match. LV/XP now show correctly in HOME top bar + sidebar. PULSE/SURGE in their own CURRENCIES section with hover tooltips.
launcher_notes: Rename-first self-update — fixes the infinite-update loop on Windows (Defender was blocking the old del+copy flow, and the bat retry counter never incremented). Failed swaps now auto-restore from backup. CLASSES roster panel removed from left side.
